moments.name: Welcome to the Grey World
moments.description: Player awakens in a desaturated world and receives initial orientation about their quest to restore color.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Welcome, traveler. You stand in a world drained of its vibrancy, where color itself has faded into memory. Once, this realm thrived with brilliant hues—now, only shades of grey remain. You have been chosen to restore what was lost. The journey begins here, on the first island, where ancient mysteries await your discovery.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Look around you. Feel the weight of this silence. Your task is clear: awaken the prisms, solve their puzzles, and watch as color flows back into existence. Let us begin your awakening.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"The first step is taken. Now, let us discover what secrets this island holds.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A desaturated grey landscape with a lone figure standing in the center, surrounded by colorless environment and mysterious ancient structures in the distance under a monochrome sky.

moments.name: Place the First Crystal
moments.description: Player grabs the crystal and places it into its designated placepoint to begin restoring color to the island.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"You see a glowing crystal nearby. Pick it up and place it into the marked holder to begin restoring color to this world.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Excellent! The crystal is in place. You can see color beginning to return to the island. Let's continue.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"That doesn't fit here. Look for the correct holder for the crystal.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Remember, you need to grab the glowing crystal and place it into the marked holder.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Pick up the crystal with your hand controller, then bring it to the glowing holder and release it to place it inside.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Well done! The first step is complete. Color is starting to return.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A monochrome mystical island with a glowing cyan crystal hovering near a luminescent placepoint holder, player reaching to grab the crystal, partial color bleeding into surrounding flora.

moments.name: Strike the Xylophone Bones
moments.description: Player grabs the xylophone stick and strikes three bones in order to restore their color through musical interaction.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Look at these ancient bones arranged like a xylophone. Pick up the stick nearby and strike each bone to awaken their melody and restore their color.","waitForCompletion":true}

onWrong.Name: VoiceOver
onWrong.Data: {"text":"Not quite right. Try striking the highlighted bone with the stick.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Use the xylophone stick to strike each glowing bone in sequence.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Pick up the stick near you and tap it against the highlighted bone on the xylophone structure.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Beautiful! The bones sing with color and melody. The island awakens to your touch.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A mystical island setting with three large ancient bones arranged horizontally as a xylophone, player holding a wooden stick and striking the middle bone which glows with colorful light and musical energy.

moments.name: Activate the First Prism
moments.description: Touch the first prism to activate it and send it to the tower.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Now, reach out and touch the prism. Your connection will activate it and send it to the tower.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Touch the glowing prism with your hand to activate it.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Reach out and place your hand on the prism. Your touch will awaken its power.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Excellent! The first prism is now channeling color to the tower. The path to the next island is opening.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player reaching toward a glowing crystalline prism near a musical xylophone structure, with a tall stone tower visible in the background and a shimmering bridge beginning to materialize.

moments.name: Cross to the Mechanical Island
moments.description: Player transitions from Island 1 to Island 2 while receiving orientation about the mechanical challenges ahead.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"You've crossed into the Mechanical Island, where gears and mechanisms hold the next piece of Chromatica's restoration. The air hums with dormant machinery waiting to be awakened. Your task here will require precision and understanding of how these ancient systems connect.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Let's explore what mechanisms await your touch.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player standing on a stone bridge connecting two floating islands, facing a mechanical island filled with bronze gears, wheels, and ancient machinery covered in verdigris, surrounded by a desaturated gray landscape with hints of mechanical elements waiting to be activated

moments.name: Turn the Wheel
moments.description: Player rotates the wheel to activate the gear mechanism and restore color to Island 2.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"This wheel controls the gears. Grab it and give it a turn to activate the mechanism.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Grab the wheel with your hand and rotate it to engage the gears.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"The wheel right in front of you. Reach out, grab it firmly, and give it a turn.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Perfect! The gears are turning and the mechanism is working. Color is flowing back into this island.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A mechanical island with a large bronze wheel at waist height surrounded by five sets of interlocking brass gears, player reaching to rotate the wheel as gears begin to turn and color spreads across the metallic surfaces

moments.name: Collect and Place the Flowers
moments.description: Gather five purple flowers scattered along the path and place them into the offering bowl on the pedestal.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Five purple flowers are scattered along this path. Collect them and place each one in the offering bowl on the pedestal to unlock the next prism.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Look around the path — there are five purple flowers waiting to be collected and placed in the offering bowl.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Each flower must be picked up and placed into one of the glowing spots on top of the offering bowl. Find all five to continue.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Perfect! The offering is complete. The mechanism responds to your gift, and a new path opens before you.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A stone offering bowl sits on a weathered pedestal with five glowing circular placepoints on top, while purple flowers are scattered along a winding path through a mystical landscape.

moments.name: Activate the Second Prism
moments.description: Player touches the second prism to activate it and restore color to the second island.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Excellent work. The second prism awaits near the offering bowl. Touch it to restore color to this island.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"The second tower awakens. Color flows through the island like a river of light.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"The prism near the offering bowl holds the key. Touch it to continue.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Reach out and touch the glowing prism to activate it.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Two islands restored. One journey remains. The final prism awaits across the bridge.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player reaching toward a glowing cyan prism near an ornate offering bowl on a mystical island, with a beam of light connecting to a distant tower as color begins spreading through the environment

moments.name: Enter the Final Island
moments.description: Player arrives at Island 3 and receives orientation about the final restoration task.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"You have reached the final island. Before you stands the ancient well, its depths holding the last prism that will restore color to Chromatica. But first, you must prove your understanding of harmony by assembling the crystal shards in the correct sequence.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Look carefully at the crystal shards scattered around the island. Each one resonates with a unique frequency. Your task is to place them in the offering bowl in ascending order, from the lowest pitch to the highest. Only then will the prism awaken.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"The crystal shards await your wisdom. Begin when you are ready.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player stands on the mystical third island with an ancient stone well at its center, a dormant prism visible within, surrounded by four glowing crystal shards scattered across moss-covered ruins under twilight sky

moments.name: Place the Crystal Shards in Order
moments.description: Player places four crystal shards sequentially around the well rim to restore the island's color.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Four crystal shards lie scattered near the well. Place them in order around the rim to complete the restoration.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"First shard placed. Continue with the second.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Second shard in place. The pattern becomes clear.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Three shards set. One remains to complete the restoration.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"That shard doesn't belong there. Look for the correct position.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Not quite right. Try a different shard for this position.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"That's the wrong shard. Check the sequence carefully.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Focus on the highlighted shard and its matching placement point. The sequence matters.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Place each crystal shard in order: first, second, third, then fourth. Follow the highlighted guidance.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"All four shards are in place. The island pulses with restored energy as color returns to every corner.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player standing near a mystical well with four crystal shards glowing softly on nearby pedestals, with four outlined placement points arranged around the well's rim in a clear sequential pattern, while the monochrome island landscape waits for color restoration

moments.name: Activate the Final Prism
moments.description: Player touches the final prism to trigger its animation to Tower 3, establishing the third beam link.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"One final prism remains. Touch it to complete the restoration of Chromatica.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Touch the glowing prism to activate it.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Place your hand on the third prism near the well.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Excellent! The third beam is now active. All three towers are connected.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: Player reaching toward a glowing cyan prism hovering near a stone well on the third island, with Tower 3 visible in background and mystical energy radiating from the prism

moments.name: The World Reborn
moments.description: Full world color restoration as lasers connect all three towers, celebrating the completion of Chromatica's restoration.

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Look! The towers are connecting... the ancient network of light is awakening! Watch as color floods back into every corner of Chromatica!","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"You've done it! The prisms are aligned, the frequencies harmonized, and the crystals united. Chromatica lives again in full color and light. You are a true guardian of this world.","waitForCompletion":true}

actions.Name: VoiceOver
actions.Data: {"text":"Your journey through Chromatica is complete. The world is restored, vibrant and whole once more. Thank you for bringing light back to our realm.","waitForCompletion":true}

moments.sceneDescription: A fully restored vibrant world of Chromatica with brilliant lasers connecting three ancient towers across the landscape, radiating colors through crystalline prisms as the environment transitions from monochrome to full saturation
